clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall provide accounting services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for [ACCOUNTING_PERIOD].

The Client shall provide accurate and complete financial records and information necessary to perform the Services, within [RECORD_SUBMISSION_PERIOD_DAYS] days of the Service Provider's request. The Service Provider shall not be liable for errors or delay resulting from inaccurate, incomplete, or late information provided by the Client.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

Where the Client specifically authorizes it, the Service Provider shall represent the Client before [TAX_AUTHORITY_NAME] in connection with [REPRESENTATION_MATTER], for an additional fee of [REPRESENTATION_FEE].
Where the Services include payroll processing, the Service Provider shall process payroll for [NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES] employees for an additional fee of [PAYROLL_FEE] per [BILLING_PERIOD].
Where the Services include financial planning advice, the Service Provider shall provide it as described in [FINANCIAL_PLANNING_SCOPE] for an additional fee of [FINANCIAL_PLANNING_FEE].
Where the Services include business consulting advice, the Client remains solely responsible for decisions to implement, and the manner of implementing, any recommendation.

Where the Client requires urgent assistance outside standard turnaround times, the Service Provider shall use reasonable efforts to respond within [EMERGENCY_RESPONSE_TIME], for an additional fee of [EMERGENCY_SUPPORT_FEE].

The Service Provider shall track and inform the Client of the statutory filing deadlines applicable to [SERVICES_CONTRACTED], including [FILING_DEADLINE_LIST]. The Client shall provide the information required under the Responsibilities Clause in time for the Service Provider to meet each deadline.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.

The Service Provider shall implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the Client's financial and personal data processed in connection with the Services, and shall notify the Client without undue delay upon becoming aware of a breach involving that data.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
